themes.name: Deep Ocean Explorer
themes.story_level_1: You've just arrived at the Deep Ocean Research Station. The previous researcher left in a hurry and the data files are a mess. Explore the station's file system and get things organized before the next expedition departs.
themes.story_level_2: The station is organized — nice work. Now the science team needs you to analyze the research data. Dig into the logs and files to find patterns and anomalies.

themes.name: Mars Mission Control
themes.description: Run a space mission control center
themes.story_level_1: Mission Control, we have a situation. The last shift left the data archives in complete disarray — files are scattered, directories are missing, and the flight director is asking for a status report in an hour. Get the file system under control before the next comm window opens.
themes.story_level_2: Mission Control is operational again — good work. Houston now needs you to run analysis on the telemetry logs and mission data. Pull the numbers they need before the press briefing.
